message:
fix(comparison): stopword-aware gene matching + tropism filtering

- synteny + structural-variants: tokenize gene names more robustly (keep single-letter terms), filter uninformative stopwords ("hypothetical", "protein", "gp", etc), and remove .includes() shortcuts that caused false matches (e.g. "protein A" vs "protein B").
- synteny tests: ensure purely stopword annotations do not align.
- tropism: tighten motif regexes and include hypothetical/uncharacterized genes only when sequence evidence supports tail-fiber-like receptor candidates.
